display_text: Orb of Venom, Cost: 350: Applies a magical damage-over-time effect on attack, dealing 10 damage per second for 3 seconds. A cost-effective early harass tool that provides consistent lane pressure, especially on heroes with high attack speed or range. Its damage ignores physical armor, making it strong against low-health targets. Stats: CD: 9s, DoT: 10 dps, Duration: 3s, Total Damage: 30.

display_text: Orb of Venom, Cost: 350: Provides no direct attribute bonuses. The item's value is purely offensive, derived from its unique attack modifier. Offers cheap early game trading power.

display_text: Orb of Venom, Cost: 350: Primarily an early laning and harassment tool. Its consistent damage over time forces enemies to consume regen, providing a gold-efficient advantage in the lane. Effective at securing kill thresholds on mobile heroes.
search_text: orb of venom laning, lane harassment, early game pressure, OOV lane, harass tool, trading item, pressure lane, force regen, laning phase, Orb of Venom

display_text: Orb of Venom, Cost: 350: Strong synergy with heroes who can apply it frequently, like ranged carries or melee heroes with gap closers. It can be an effective starting or early-game pickup on roaming supports like Bounty Hunter to enhance their ganking damage.
